topic: Mk.XII Phase 3b 70B vast.ai R1 download — first-LIVE attempt design (Pattern 6c canonicalization)
raw_100_fallback_disclosure: kick infra sub-agent unwired (21st iter). In-context fallback per raw 100.
carry_forward_origin: Mk.XII Phase 3b 70B forward measurement BLOCKED via single-pod RunPod path (Pattern 6 cumulative-bytes ceiling ~35-40GB; 70B fp16=140GB exceeds 3.5×). Pattern 6c relay architecture documented in docs/runpod_large_model_dispatch_template_20260427.md. RunPod 4-strike sustained fault confirmed pre-SSH stuck on 4 distinct pods (H100 SXM x2 + RTX A5000 x2) — cross-vendor R1 path required. Alt-vendor matrix from prior kick (2026-04-27_mk-xii-phase3b-70b-alt-vendor-strategy-runpod-4-strike-bypas): vast.ai / AWS G6 / GCP A3 / Lambda Labs / CoreWeave.
scope_boundary: DESIGN ONLY — concrete first-LIVE attempt template for vast.ai R1 download_pod (no actual pod-create this cycle).

intake.topic_summary: vast.ai R1 download_pod first-LIVE attempt: provision H100 spot $1-2/hr persistent-volume vol-anima-llama70b, huggingface-cli download Llama-3.1-70B 140GB fp16 with resume-download. R2 measurement_pod (RunPod or AWS) attaches same volume for forward + tomography. R3 verifier hetzner CPU-only (raw 91 post-emission verify). R4 Mac-local orchestrator (raw 40 mandate).

falsifiers_preregistered.name: vast-ai-account-bootstrap-feasibility
falsifiers_preregistered.criterion: vast.ai account provisioning + API key + persistent volume creation feasible without admin-block (cf anima_physics_admin_access.json 6/9 substrate signup-blocked)

falsifiers_preregistered.name: h100-spot-availability-30d
falsifiers_preregistered.criterion: vast.ai H100 spot instance availability >0 in any region during 30d window post-signup (vast.ai is spot-marketplace, not always available)
falsifiers_preregistered.verdict_check: vast.ai status API check or manual probe

falsifiers_preregistered.name: 70b-fp16-140gb-download-time-under-4hr
falsifiers_preregistered.criterion: Llama-3.1-70B download (140GB fp16, ~14 shards * ~10GB each) completes < 4hr at vast.ai network egress (typical 100-1000 MB/s); cost cap = 4hr * $2/hr = $8 for R1 phase

falsifiers_preregistered.name: persistent-volume-cross-vendor-attach
falsifiers_preregistered.criterion: vast.ai persistent volume (or s3-mounted snapshot) can be attached/synced by R2 RunPod pod via scp/aws-s3-sync (cross-vendor data motion ~$0.05/GB egress = $7 for 140GB)
falsifiers_preregistered.verdict_check: feasibility of cross-vendor volume attach OR scp from vast.ai to R2

falsifiers_preregistered.name: raw-86-cost-attribution-emit
falsifiers_preregistered.criterion: every R1/R2/R3/R4 pod-create event emits cost-center=mk-xii-phase3b + task-id + cost-estimate to raw 77 audit ledger per raw 86 forward-spec

falsifiers_preregistered.name: raw-78-daemon-singleton-orchestrator
falsifiers_preregistered.criterion: R4 orchestrator process uses dual-validation (mtime-TTL + PID kill -0) per raw 78 daemon-singleton-stale-lock-witness

template.network_volume_attach: via vast.ai cli or web dashboard at create time
template.init_command: pip install huggingface-cli && hf auth login --token <secret get huggingface.token>
template.watchdog: tool/anima_runpod_orchestrator.hexa pattern adapted; manual terminate if no progress past 30min
template.post_download_action: snapshot persistent volume OR upload to s3 bucket for R2 attach

axis_b.name: R2 measurement_pod attach paths

options.description: RunPod pod with vast.ai-volume-snapshot mounted via s3 sync. Pro: RunPod GPU available; Con: cross-vendor egress cost $7
Run measurement on same vast.ai pod that downloaded. Pro: zero egress; Con: vast.ai pod stability variable, R1+R2 coupled
AWS G6e (NVIDIA L40S 48GB / H100) with s3 bucket pre-uploaded. Pro: enterprise reliability; Con: pricier
RunPod persistent volume attached after vast.ai upload. Pro: native attach; Con: vendor lock

axis_b.recommendation: Option A first (RunPod established, additional cost $7 acceptable) OR Option B (zero egress, vast.ai assumed stable past R1 completion); fall back to C if both fail

phases.R2_measurement: RunPod or AWS H100 * 2-4hr forward + tomography = $6-12 + cross-vendor egress 140GB * $0.05/GB = $7 = $13-19

fan_out.correlation_estimate: axes a/b/c — R1 template vs R2 attach options vs cost budget. corr ~0.30 each (interlocking).

tier_1_promotions.claim: vast.ai R1 download_pod template ready for first-LIVE attempt: H100 spot < $2/hr, 200GB persistent volume vol-anima-llama70b, huggingface-cli resume-download Llama-3.1-70B fp16 140GB, expected 2-4hr wallclock, cost ceiling $8 R1 phase. R2 attach via Option A (RunPod + s3 sync) OR Option B (in-place vast.ai). Total first-live $35-47 within own 5 mandate. Forward-pending: vast.ai signup completion + first-LIVE pod-create.

core_5_op_kernel.fixpoint_marker: Mk.XII Phase 3b alt-vendor R1 design 3-axis ceiling: formal-axis = Pattern 6c 4-role pipeline + raw 86 cost-attribution + raw 78 daemon-singleton orchestrator + physical-axis = vast.ai H100 spot 1.4Tflops + 200GB volume bandwidth + computational-axis = huggingface-cli resume-download bounded-IO algorithm
